alert.Alert.title: Alert represents an alert triggered when a vital reading breaches a threshold.

alert.AlertThreshold.title: AlertThreshold defines the monitoring bounds for a vital type.

user.Device.title: Device represents a registered monitoring device.

user.User.title: User represents a user profile stored locally.

uuid.UUID.title: A UUID is a 128 bit (16 byte) Universal Unique IDentifier as defined in RFC

vital.VitalReading.title: VitalReading represents a single vital sign measurement.

vital.VitalSummaryBucket.title: VitalSummaryBucket is a single time-aggregated bucket.

get.summary: CheckTables lists which required tables exist in the database.

post.summary: RunMigration creates any missing tables using idempotent DDL.
AcknowledgeAlert marks an alert as acknowledged.

get.summary: ListAlerts returns a filtered, paginated list of alerts.

post.summary: ForgotPassword triggers a password reset email.
Login authenticates an existing user via the configured auth provider.

delete.summary: RemoveMFA removes MFA from the account.

post.summary: VerifyMFA confirms MFA enrollment with a TOTP code.
Refresh exchanges a refresh token for a new access token.
Register creates a new user account via the configured auth provider.

get.summary: ListThresholds returns the current user's alert thresholds.

delete.summary: DeleteThreshold removes a threshold (reverts to defaults).

put.summary: SetThreshold sets or updates a threshold for a vital type.

delete.summary: DeleteAccount deletes the current user's account and all associated data.

get.description: Auto-provisions a local profile from JWT claims on first access.
get.summary: GetProfile returns the current user's profile.

patch.summary: UpdateProfile updates the current user's profile fields.

get.summary: ListDevices returns the current user's registered devices.

post.summary: RegisterDevice registers a new monitoring device.

get.summary: GetVital returns a specific vital reading.
ListVitals lists vital readings with filters and pagination.

post.summary: RecordVital records a new vital sign reading.

get.summary: GetLatestVitals returns the most recent reading per vital type.
GetSummary returns aggregated vital stats for a time range.

post.description: Dev/local only — bypasses email confirmation for testing.
post.summary: CreateTestUser creates a pre-confirmed user via Supabase Admin API.

get.summary: Health is a public health check endpoint.
Me returns the current authenticated user's information.

HandleWebSocket upgrades HTTP to WebSocket. Authentication via query param
token.
